mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_review (user_id, book_id, content, rating) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{content}, #{rating})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.username, u.real_name FROM book_review r JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book_review WHERE book_id = #{bookId}
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(rating), 0) FROM book_review WHERE book_id = #{bookId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM book_review WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
